node.html: Distributed key-value data store in Go sharded across server clusters and SQLite database, with two-phase commit (2PC) protocol for cross-shard transactions, ensuring atomicity and consistency across the nodes. Implemented two-phase locking (2PL) and Write-Ahead Logging (WAL) mechanisms to enable transaction rollbacks for persistent storage and crash recovery mechanisms.

Constructed state machine replication system using custom consensus protocols, incorporating multi-thread processing, communication over RPC, averaging to 100+ transactions per second. Explored implementations of modified Paxos with RAFT catch-up model and linear variant of Byzantine Fault Tolerance protocol to create 12 node fault-tolerant system maintaining integrity across servers.

Built proxy server in Go to tunnel traffic between clients and publicly accessible TCP services, securing data transmission through two-way AES256 encryption. Also devised monitoring tools like HTTP/TLS sniffer that extracts requests, SNI, TLS version from live traffic and TCP fingerprinting tool on Kali VM to identify and procure information on 1000+ open target ports.

This is Web Document Analyzer and Classification Engine, a multi-model app that performs detailed analysis of obscure URLs using text data. Performs domain identification using LDA model with 82% accuracy trained on 120k+ values. Generates information graphs forming topic associations across similar URLs, with semantic search capabilities.

MTASE Multilingual Text Analyzer and Summarization Engine is built to analyze, translate and summarize any piece of unknown text provided by a user. It forms abstractive and extractive summaries of text, along with keyword identification of multilingual text. The TFIDF and LSA algorithm is used to publish an analysis of 17000+ dark web services in Microsoft Journal.

ConvNet trained on over 5000 Chest XRay images to classify presence of Pneumonia in a patient. Achieved 0.83 recall, 0.91 precision and 0.87 f1-score. Handled high overfitting, through data augmentation, batchnorm and dropouts reducing variance. Created a pipeline to serve the model on a web application through flask, deployed on Heroku.
